heading: Disbursement of appropriations for Botanic Garden
label: 2144 Disbursement of appropriations for Botanic Garden
text: On and after , all appropriations made on account of the Botanic Garden shall be disbursed for that purpose in the same manner as other appropriations under the control of the Architect of the Capitol.November 5, 1990
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 216d of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002
